qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of IgBLAST?
qa_pairs.answer: IgBLAST was developed at NCBI to facilitate the analysis of immunoglobulin variable domain sequences. It has also been extended to perform analysis for T cell receptor (TR) sequences.

qa_pairs.question: Which search algorithm does IgBLAST utilize?
qa_pairs.answer: IgBLAST utilizes the BLAST search algorithm.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about IgBLAST?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find more information on the homepage: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/igblast/intro.html.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of IgBLAST are available?
qa_pairs.answer: IgBLAST is available in versions 1.17.0 and 1.18.0.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of sequences can IgBLAST analyze?
qa_pairs.answer: IgBLAST can analyze immunoglobulin variable domain sequences and T cell receptor (TR) sequences.
